artifacts.name: Ring of Duality
artifacts.description: Reduce damage by 10%, but your every second hit has a 25% chance to hit twice

artifacts.name: Kensei's Ancient Sheath
artifacts.description: Only usable by kensei. Increase **Sword's path** damage by 1%. Increase attack speed by 5%

artifacts.name: Warrior's Ancient Amulet
artifacts.description: Only usable by warrior. Reduce **Heavy Blow** penalty by 5%. Increase damage by 5%

artifacts.name: Umbral Reaver's Ancient Dagger
artifacts.description: Only usable by umbral reaver. Reduce **Poisoned Blade** penalty by 5%. Increase dodge chance by 5%

artifacts.name: Lucksworn's Ancient Coin
artifacts.description: Only usable by lucksworn. Reduce **Gambler's fate** penalty by 1%. Increase loot chance by 5%

artifacts.name: Ring of Sacrifice
artifacts.description: Decrease health by 10%. Increase damage by 10%
